title: codereview P3: naming of KISS_CMD_* should follow existing style (uppercase with KISS_ prefix consistent)
description: Existing defines use SLIP_ prefix; new ones mix KISS_CMD_DATA. Make consistent as KISS_CMD_DATA_PORT0. Minor but for 3-pass clean. --type=task --priority=3 --labels=codereview,umb4,opinion
close_reason: Fixed in edits: added consistent defines, capabilities, working kiss_encode with error handling for EMSGSIZE/overflow/invalid, basic decode. Stubs addressed P1/P2. No open P0-P2 findings after 3 passes (findings were P1/P2/P3, all fixed; P4 opinion closed). Research child complete.
